targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time_window_start AS "time",
  weighted_instability_score
FROM public.risk_alerts_gold
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_window_start)
  AND country_name = '${country}'
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  time_window_start AS "time",
  weighted_instability_score
FROM public.risk_alerts_gold
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_window_start)
  AND country_name = '${country}'
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  time_window_start AS "time",
  protest_event_count,
  conflict_event_count,
  diplomatic_tension_event_count
FROM public.risk_alerts_gold
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_window_start)
  AND country_name = '${country}'
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  time_window_start,
  time_window_end,
  weighted_instability_score,
  total_event_count,
  protest_event_count,
  conflict_event_count,
  diplomatic_tension_event_count,
  avg_goldstein_scale
FROM public.risk_alerts_gold
WHERE $__timeFilter(time_window_start)
  AND country_name = '${country}'
  AND is_alert = TRUE
ORDER BY time_window_start DESC
LIMIT 50;

WITH latest_alert_window AS (
  SELECT MAX(time_window_start) AS time_window_start
  FROM public.risk_alerts_gold
  WHERE country_name = '${country}'
    AND is_alert = TRUE
    AND $__timeFilter(time_window_start)
), selected_country AS (
  SELECT country_code
  FROM public.risk_alerts_gold
  WHERE country_name = '${country}'
  ORDER BY time_window_start DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  es.event_code,
  ec.event_description,
  es.event_root_code,
  er.event_root_description,
  COUNT(*) AS event_count,
  ROUND(AVG(es.goldstein_scale)::numeric, 2) AS avg_goldstein,
  SUM(es.num_mentions) AS total_mentions,
  SUM(es.num_articles) AS total_articles
FROM public.events_silver es
JOIN latest_alert_window lw
  ON es.event_added_ts >= lw.time_window_start
 AND es.event_added_ts <  lw.time_window_start + INTERVAL '1 hour'
LEFT JOIN public.dim_cameo_event_codes ec
  ON ec.event_code = es.event_code
LEFT JOIN public.dim_cameo_event_roots er
  ON er.event_root_code = es.event_root_code
WHERE es.focus_country_code = (SELECT country_code FROM selected_country)
GROUP BY
  es.event_code,
  ec.event_description,
  es.event_root_code,
  er.event_root_description
ORDER BY event_count DESC, avg_goldstein ASC
LIMIT 20;

panels.title: Top Event Codes in Latest Alert Window (${country})

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_alert_window AS (
  SELECT MAX(time_window_start) AS time_window_start
  FROM public.risk_alerts_gold
  WHERE country_name = '${country}'
    AND is_alert = TRUE
    AND $__timeFilter(time_window_start)
), selected_country AS (
  SELECT country_code
  FROM public.risk_alerts_gold
  WHERE country_name = '${country}'
  ORDER BY time_window_start DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  es.source_url,
  COUNT(*) AS event_count,
  SUM(es.num_mentions) AS total_mentions,
  SUM(es.num_articles) AS total_articles,
  ROUND(AVG(es.goldstein_scale)::numeric, 2) AS avg_goldstein
FROM public.events_silver es
JOIN latest_alert_window lw
  ON es.event_added_ts >= lw.time_window_start
 AND es.event_added_ts <  lw.time_window_start + INTERVAL '1 hour'
WHERE es.focus_country_code = (SELECT country_code FROM selected_country)
GROUP BY es.source_url
ORDER BY event_count DESC, total_mentions DESC
LIMIT 20;

panels.title: Top Source URLs in Latest Alert Window (${country})

targets.rawSql:
WITH selected_country AS (
  SELECT country_code
  FROM public.risk_alerts_gold
  WHERE country_name = '${country}'
  ORDER BY time_window_start DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  es.event_added_ts,
  es.global_event_id,
  es.event_code,
  ec.event_description,
  es.event_root_code,
  er.event_root_description,
  es.goldstein_scale,
  es.avg_tone,
  es.num_mentions,
  es.num_sources,
  es.num_articles,
  es.actor1_name,
  es.actor1_country_code,
  cc1.country_name AS actor1_country_name,
  es.actor1_known_group_code,
  kg1.known_group_name AS actor1_known_group_name,
  es.actor2_name,
  es.actor2_country_code,
  cc2.country_name AS actor2_country_name,
  es.actor2_known_group_code,
  kg2.known_group_name AS actor2_known_group_name,
  es.focus_location_name,
  es.source_url,
  es.is_protest_related,
  es.is_conflict_related,
  es.is_diplomatic_tension_related
FROM public.events_silver es
LEFT JOIN public.dim_cameo_event_codes ec
  ON ec.event_code = es.event_code
LEFT JOIN public.dim_cameo_event_roots er
  ON er.event_root_code = es.event_root_code
LEFT JOIN public.dim_cameo_country_codes cc1
  ON cc1.country_code = es.actor1_country_code
LEFT JOIN public.dim_cameo_country_codes cc2
  ON cc2.country_code = es.actor2_country_code
LEFT JOIN public.dim_cameo_known_groups kg1
  ON kg1.known_group_code = es.actor1_known_group_code
LEFT JOIN public.dim_cameo_known_groups kg2
  ON kg2.known_group_code = es.actor2_known_group_code
WHERE $__timeFilter(es.event_added_ts)
  AND es.focus_country_code = (SELECT country_code FROM selected_country)
  AND (
    es.is_protest_related
    OR es.is_conflict_related
    OR es.is_diplomatic_tension_related
  )
ORDER BY es.event_added_ts DESC
LIMIT 100;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT country_name FROM public.risk_alerts_gold ORDER BY 1;
list.label: Country
list.name: country
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT country_name FROM public.risk_alerts_gold ORDER BY 1;
